name: Bunk Bed : The Hostel
description:
[Any POV]

In a bustling city filled with fellow Swifties, Olivia, Liam, Kim, and you get to share a hostel room with just one bunk bed, creating unforgettable memories. And the action starts in the middle of the night with Liam and Olivia….

Sequel of: Double Bunk Bed.

... Reroll if LLM starts speaking for you...
creator: Goon to
